title: Ruby
description: This is a simple mod that adds a new ore with a vanilla style! An ore that will combine the best characteristics of netherite and gold items.
body: # Ruby This is a simple mod that adds a new ore with a vanilla style! An ore that will combine the best characteristics of netherite and gold items. ![This is an image](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/oeEsydlj/images/56dd862155d3f9d7d6dfae6f08de96b6aeaad1c0.png) ## Finding ore #### Ore is found in all biomes associated with the jungle, as well as in lush cave #### Also , the ore is very rare ( 100,000 ores for 1,000,000 chunks ) ![This is an image](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/oeEsydlj/images/6a3a8f7b4f450cff89d5f7a19c721e4caaabb3db.png) ## Achievements #### There are also achievements to adding more interest and goals ![This is an image](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/oeEsydlj/images/a7921c31b0946f8c4bd4a031438c238b124c2a5d.png) ## Сrafting #### Items are being crafted on the Smithing table as shown in the screenshot ![This is an image](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/oeEsydlj/images/32f0639d1eb782350e70c1b9fa4898d16da555ba.png) ## Beacon #### And of course you can build a beacon using ruby blocks ![This is an image](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/oeEsydlj/images/76a24df2dbee6ee53f1932b9abd81c449b4b4bca.png)
